x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description: The party who earns and receives the incentives.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Originator
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The party or event that initiates the earning.

Comment
Example: Merchant transaction, employer payroll, referral action.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Funding Party
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The entity that funds the incentive liability.

Comment:
Example: Bank or promotional partner.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Processing System
x-enumeration-literals.description: The system that calculates and posts earned incentives.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Validator
x-enumeration-literals.description: The entity that validates eligibility and approves crediting (if required).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Partner
x-enumeration-literals.description:
External entity contributing to earn event.

Comment:
Example: Co-branded merchant.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Settlement Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: The entity responsible for liability reduction and financial posting.
